top_signals.title: Nigeria's NNPC Revenue Drops in May Despite Higher Oil Output
top_signals.summary: NNPC Limited booked lower revenues in May compared to April despite the higher crude oil and condensate production, the latest monthly figures by the Nigeria's state oil and gas firm showed. NNPC's revenues fell to $3.15 billion (4.335 trillion Nigerian naira) in May, from $3.62 billion (4.97 trillion naira) in April, as oil prices eased from the Iran war-time highs seen in April. Profit after tax also fell in May from the previous month, despite the fact that crude and condensate production inched up to 1.73 million barrels per day (bpd), up from…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CORCA heads to Senate amid cargo theft debate
top_signals.summary:
The bipartisan CORCA bill passed the House with overwhelming support, but a growing debate over cargo theft data has followed it to the Senate. Critics question whether documented losses justify a larger federal response, while supporters argue the current reporting system misses much of the problem.

The post CORCA heads to Senate amid cargo theft debate appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ‘Accumulation beneath the surface’: Bitcoin rebounds above $61,000 as long-term holders accumulate amid steady ETF outflows
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin reclaims $61,000 as Glassnode and Bitfinex flag long-term holder accumulation beneath persistent ETF selling.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India Food Watchdog Targets Energy Drinks Including Red Bull for Misbranding
top_signals.summary: India’s food regulator has issued notices to at least six energy-drink makers including Red Bull GmbH’s local unit, for allegedly making misleading claims, tightening oversight of a rapidly expanding category in the country.

top_signals.summary: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.
